clusters.label: Group standings pages
identicalSections: Qualification info box (template text, team names interpolated)
clusters.editorialDifferentiation: NONE — no unique prose per group
clusters.remediationAction: Add 2-3 sentences of group-specific editorial: competing teams' strengths, key fixture, historical note

clusters.label: Team profile pages
identicalSections: FAQPage JSON-LD (3 FAQ questions with team name interpolated)
uniqueContentPerPage: firstMatchResultSentence (1 dynamic sentence for past matches)
clusters.editorialDifferentiation: MINIMAL — squad data differentiates, but no editorial narrative
clusters.remediationAction: Add per-team static bio paragraph (50-80 words) from static data file; expand FAQ answers from 1 sentence to 2-3

clusters.label: Timezone schedule pages
identicalSections: Quick facts grid (Teams: 48, Groups: 12, Fixtures: N, Timezones: 7 — same except TZ name)
Full fixture table (same 104+ matches, only time values differ)
FAQ section (identical 5 questions; only {zoneNote} changes per answer)
uniqueContentPerPage: tz_context_* string (1 sentence per region, currently 15-25 words)
UTC offset applied to all kickoff times
Zone name in H1 and intro
clusters.editorialDifferentiation: VERY LOW — 1 sentence per page; FAQs are template with variable substitution
clusters.remediationAction: Expand tz_context_* to 3-5 sentences: which participating teams are from this region, peak viewing windows, cultural context. Add 3 region-specific FAQ questions.

clusters.label: Legal / policy pages
uniqueContentPerPage: Content is unique per page; legal boilerplate
clusters.remediationAction: None needed for similarity; content is appropriately different
